creator: lidl@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dag-Erling SmÃ¸rgrav from comment #11)

The original review was posted on April 11, and you were one of the reviewers from the initial creation of the review.  (I put you there because you're listed in the MAINTAINERS file for sshd.)

I dealt with all the review comments I received, and finally the code was committed on June 7th.  That was before the code freeze by a few days.

Six weeks seemed like adequate time for any code review you might have wanted to do.
